---
name: Refactor
about: Request a code improvement
title: "[Refactor] "
labels: refactor
assignees: ""
---

### Current Problem
> What is the problem? (readability, bloated components, duplicated logic, design debt, etc.)

### Improvement Plan
> How will it be changed? (component splitting, custom hook extraction, type cleanup, etc.)

### Scope of Impact
> List of components, hooks, and pages that will be affected.

### Notes
> Whether the refactor is possible without changing UI behavior, how to check for regressions, etc.
